author: Katie
review:
DO. NOT. DO. IT.
I REPEAT.

author: LadyBugg
review: Got into a house quickly! Steve is Great and can get you into a home you need!

author: Sasha Simmons

author: Robert Sukovaty

author: jay palmer
review: We have started having issues with Steve Springer the "manager" as he doesn't return phone calls or emails. He sends the maintenance man over without notice. Had threatened eviction for no reason and doesn't fix ANYTHING! We have no drawer

author: Sarahlyn Hewitt
review: We lived in the Ruth Villa apartments for about a year. We didn't have much trouble living them besides a serious ant problem. They wanted to bomb our apartment but I said no because I have a pet and I didn't want her sick. Every apartment

author: Andrew C
review: Was renting through cascade for 3+ years. No issues while actually renting as I payed rent on time. Issues are after you move out. Do not expect to get any of the security deposit you put down back. We spent $450 dollars to have house

author: Nick Sanabria
review: Best landlord I've had in Oak Harbor

author: Melodie Williams
review: Does anybody happen to know if the hours are correct? Will he actually be there during those hours?....Ive been trying to get ahold of him to get into a different place as places need to contact previous landlord and I cant seem to get ahold of him. Help!

author: Tiffany Wilson
review: Stay far away. The landlord is impossible to get ahold of. And you will have to seek legal action to get your security deposit back.

author: Taylor Adams
review: NEVER answers the phone during business hours. Can't wait to move tf out of this place. Try somewhere else cuz these people don't deserve your money.

author: M MO Morrison
review: Great company to do business with.

ownerResponse.text: We are honored by your praises.  Thank you.
